title: -Purchase Order: Turf Star Incorporated for one 2026 Model Toro Groundsmaster 31699 Triple Deck Sports Field Mower

sections.recommendation:
Adopt a Resolution authorizing the City Manager to execute a purchase order with Turf
Star Incorporated for one 2026 Toro Groundsmaster 31699 Triple Deck Sports Field
Mower, in an amount not to exceed $184,181.
sections.fiscal_impacts:
The FY26 Adopted Public Works Department Equipment Replacement (Fund 671)
budget includes funding for the replacement of this equipment.
sections.current_situation:
The Public Works Department routinely reviews rolling stock assets utilized in the day-
to-day operation of the city operations and prioritizes the replacement of assets at the
end of their useful life. The City’s competitive bidding requirements for this purchase
have been satisfied through the utilization of Sourcewell Contract NO. 112624-TTC.
This replacement mower is needed by the Parks, Recreation, & Waterfront Department
to provide routine and timely turf care of athletic fields. This purchase order is aligned
with the City’s Strategic Plan Priorities, advancing our goal to provide state-of-the-art,
well-maintained infrastructure, amenities, and facilities.
sections.background:
The City Charter allows the City to purchase goods without undergoing a competitive
bid process if the City utilizes pricing obtained by another entity through a competitive
process. On October 8, 2024, Sourcewell released request for proposal 112624 for
Grounds Maintenance Equipment and Related Attachments. The solicitation was
released for approximately 50 days, and 55 proposals were submitted. Upon review of
proposals, the Sourcewell Proposal Evaluation Committee selected The Toro Company
as the best, most responsive proposer to meet the specifications thusly awarding
Contract No. 112624-TTC.
2180 Milvia Street, Berkeley, CA 94704 ● Tel: (510) 981-7000 ● TDD: (510) 981-6903 ● Fax: (510) 981-7099
E-Mail: manager@berkeleyca.gov Website: https://berkeleyca.gov/
Page 2 of 3
Purchase Order with Turf Star Incorporated for one 2026 Model Toro
Groundsmaster 31699 Triple Deck Sports Field Mower CONSENT CALENDAR
February 24, 2026
The Toro Company partners with regional distributors to manage sales through the
Sourcewell contract. Within the City, Turf Starr Incorporated represents the Toro brand.
Public Works purchases vehicles and equipment via cooperative contracts to ensure
competitive pricing. These vehicles are specialized and require specialized equipment
and installation. Once the new mower has arrived, the replaced mower will be sent to
auction. Auction proceeds are returned to the Equipment Maintenance Fund to support
future vehicle purchases and administrative costs.
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
The City prioritizes procuring the most environmentally clean, most efficient vehicles
available and will continue transitioning from diesel to renewable fuels toward an all-
electric fleet, where technically feasible. These proposed new trucks will be fueled by
renewable diesel and will be replaced at the end of their life with electric vehicles if
available at that time.
sections.rationale:
The current triple deck sports field mower Equipment #3861 is 10 years old and has
outlived its expected life. Additionally, the mower is fully amortized in the fleet fund for
replacement. Replacing this unit now will ensure continuity of service and limit repairs
associated with aging equipment.
sections.alternatives:
Delaying the purchase of this replacement mower was considered, but that action would
increase the preventative maintenance and repair costs associated with the existing
mower. Increased downtime would also result in comprising the inability to provide
timely maintenance services.
CONTACT PERSON
Joy Brown, Operational Manager, 510-981-6629
Bruce Pratt, Parks Superintendent, 510-981-6660
sections.attachments:
1: Resolution
Page 2
Page 3 of 3
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
PURCHASE ORDER: TURF STAR FOR ONE 2026 MODEL TORO GROUNDSMASTER
31699 TRIPLE DECK SPORTS FIELD MOWER
WHEREAS, a new sports field mower is needed by the Parks, Recreation, & Waterfront
Department; and
WHEREAS, vehicles must be replaced on a reasonable schedule to allow City employees
to carry out their duties in a safe and effective manner; and
WHEREAS, Unit Number 3861 is a 2015 model sports field mower and is due for
replacement and has reached the end of its useful life; and
WHEREAS, On October 8, 2024, Sourcewell released request for proposal 112624 for
Grounds Maintenance Equipment and Related Attachments. The solicitation was
released for approximately fifty days, and fifty-five proposals were submitted. Upon review
of proposals, the Sourcewell Proposal Evaluation Committee selected The Toro
Company as the best most responsive proposer to meet the specifications thusly
awarding Contract No. 112624-TTC; and
WHEREAS, The Toro Company partners with regional distributors to effectuate sales
through the Sourcewell contract. Within the City of Berkeley, Turf Starr Incorporated
represents the Toro brand; and
WHEREAS, the Sourcewell contract bid procedures satisfy the procurement
requirements of the City; and
WHEREAS, funds in the amount of $184,181 are available in the adopted FY 2026 budget
in the Equipment Replacement Fund (671).
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley by the
Council of the City of Berkeley that the City Manager is authorized to execute a purchase
order with Turf Star Incorporated for one 2026 Toro Groundsmaster 31699 Triple Deck
Sports Field Mower, in an amount not to exceed $184,181.
